entries.title: Matthew 19:1
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content:
they sent.The profound malice of the Pharisees appears here in their choice of companions, their affected praise, and the artful and difficult questions they proposed.

the Herodians. 16:11,12; Mr 3:6; 8:15 Master. 24,26; 26:18,49; Mr 10:17; Lu 7:40 we know. Ps 5:9; 12:2; 55:21; Pr 29:5; Isa 59:13-15; Jer 9:3-5; Eze 33:30,31 true. Mal 2:6; Joh 7:18; 14:6; 18:37; 2Co 2:17; 4:2; 1Jo 5:20 neither. De 33:9; 1Ki 22:14; Job 32:21,22; Mic 3:9-12; Mal 2:9; Mr 12:14 Lu 20:21; 2Co 5:16; Ga 1:10; 2:6; 1Th 2:4; Jas 3:17
